text.title: Serverless Architecture Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure applying the serverless-architecture-patterns methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: classify-invocation
step.action: Pick invocation class (sync / async event / workflow / stream / fan-out).

step.name: shortlist-patterns
step.action: Shortlist 2-3 candidate patterns from the fit matrix.

step.name: cost-model
step.action: Compute monthly cost; compute break-even vs containers.

step.name: cold-start-check
step.action: If budget < 200ms p99, plan provisioned concurrency / SnapStart / container.

step.name: idempotency-and-observability
step.action: Design idempotency key + storage; wire X-Ray / OTel + correlation id.

step.name: iac-template
step.action: Author IaC (SAM / CDK / Serverless Framework / Pulumi).

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with chosen + rejected + cost + cold-start + idempotency + IaC.
